---
title: "Teaching"
---

#### Computational Economics (graduate)

Teaching assistant for Prof. Bo Li · Peking University, Spring 2026

Course notes: [Quantitative Macro using JAX](https://chennoshen239.github.io/compecon-notes/)

#### Intermediate Macroeconomics (Honors)

Teaching assistant for Prof. Bo Zhao · Peking University, Fall 2024
